ab: tupaun a inaak kaviaz tu Biung, ituBunun amin a saia tu uvaaz.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Biung，他也是布農族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Biung, and he is also an Bunun child.

ab: muskun a kaimin sian Nansalu isnavaan.
ch: 我們一起在南沙魯部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Nansalu tribe.

ab: mabuntu a kaimin muskun ta’aza mas madadaingaz palihabasan, mahansiap amin a kaimin malisBunun.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說布農族語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Bunun proficiently.

ab: malauskav a saikin aat masmuh, mapucis a Biung aat matukulaaz.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Biung很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Biung is short and thin.

ab: mahatba a Biung, mazima amin bunun mas saicia.
ch: Biung很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Biung is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
